allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs", "C:\\tools", "C:\\nodejs"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Get-ChildItem $p -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object Name -match "node" | Select-Object FullName } })
